title: cymbalaria glutinosa subsp. glutinosa
intro: Cymbalaria glutinosa subsp. glutinosa, also known as the small wall penny-cress or small wall pennywort, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Plantaginaceae, characterized by its small, yellowish-green flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cymbalaria glutinosa subsp. glutinosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
